changelog: New module architecture, server profile manager, pack manager, optional Bomb Server Bridge foundation, upgraded overlay data context, Latest Updates tab, and safer 2.x release workflow. Bomb Client remains external only: no injection, hooks, memory editing, packet manipulation, traffic modification, or installed Bedrock file edits.
notes: Bomb Client 2.0 Core is a required update with modules, server profiles, packs, bridge mock mode, and update hub support.
